style_a.name: 灰暗现实主义
style_a.prompt_suffix: handheld camera, film grain, desaturated cold tones, blue-grey color palette, urban isolation, dimly lit

style_b.name: 东方赛博神话
style_b.prompt_suffix: epic cyber mythology, golden and neon blue palette, weightless atmosphere, digital particles, majestic scale

music_sync.lyrics: 指尖跃动 握住了神秘的奇迹 / 逻辑洪流 冲破了凡人的距离

atmosphere.overall_mood: 数字世界初体验——漂浮、敲击虚拟键盘、逻辑洪流奔涌的壮观景象
atmosphere.lighting: 金色粒子发光 + 霓虹蓝辉光

video_prompt: A coder floating in golden digital space typing on holographic keyboard, golden code torrents flowing from fingertips into vast data rivers, epic cyber mythology atmosphere, 16:9, 15s.

bgm.description: 前副歌段，节奏推进，合成器铺底，鼓点密集

storyboard_9grid.scene_description: 主角漂浮在金色数字虚空中，四周流淌着发光的代码河流

characters.name: 程序员
characters.action: 在虚空中漂浮，双手在身前比划

storyboard_9grid.atmosphere: 浩瀚的数字星海——如同置身宇宙
storyboard_9grid.sfx: 深空回响 + 粒子流声
storyboard_9grid.ai_image_prompt: A young man floating weightlessly in a vast golden digital void, surrounded by flowing rivers of luminescent code, golden particles and neon blue data streams drifting past, epic scale cosmic digital space, cyber mythology atmosphere, awe and wonder, 16:9 aspect ratio

storyboard_9grid.scene_description: 主角面前凝聚出一架半透明全息键盘，按键泛着金色光芒

characters.name: 程序员
characters.action: 双手伸出，触碰凝聚成型的全息键盘

transition.description: 全息键盘从粒子中凝聚

storyboard_9grid.atmosphere: 道具在数字空间中显形
storyboard_9grid.sfx: 全息投影凝聚的电子声
storyboard_9grid.ai_image_prompt: A holographic golden keyboard materializing from swirling digital particles in front of a floating figure, translucent keys glowing with golden light, each key showing tiny code symbols, cyber mythology space background, epic digital atmosphere, 16:9 aspect ratio

storyboard_9grid.scene_description: 指尖触碰键盘，每次击键迸发出金色涟漪向四周扩散
storyboard_9grid.atmosphere: 每次击键都是一次创造——指尖跃动的奇迹
storyboard_9grid.sfx: 清脆的机械键盘声 + 金色涟漪扩散音
storyboard_9grid.ai_image_prompt: Extreme close-up of fingers rapidly typing on a holographic golden keyboard, each keystroke sending golden ripple waves expanding outward through digital space, code symbols streaming from each pressed key, golden sparks, epic detail, cyber mythology theme, 16:9 aspect ratio

storyboard_9grid.scene_description: 金色代码从键盘上方汇聚成巨大的数据洪流

characters.name: 程序员
characters.action: 继续敲击，抬头仰望汇聚的代码洪流

storyboard_9grid.atmosphere: 渺小个体创造出壮阔代码洪流
storyboard_9grid.ai_image_prompt: A massive golden data torrent forming above a small floating figure typing on a holographic keyboard, the code streams converging into a towering river of light flowing upward, dramatic scale contrast, golden and neon blue palette, epic cyber mythology, low angle looking up, 16:9 aspect ratio

storyboard_9grid.scene_description: 代码洪流形成巨大的漩涡，主角在漩涡中心高速旋转上升

characters.name: 程序员
characters.action: 被代码漩涡托举上升，双臂展开

storyboard_9grid.atmosphere: 代码的力量将他推向更高——冲破限制
storyboard_9grid.sfx: 上升加速的风声 + 代码流声
storyboard_9grid.ai_image_prompt: A figure rising through the center of a massive spiraling golden code vortex, arms spread wide, ascending rapidly, the data spiral growing enormous around them, brilliant golden particles and neon blue energy trails, epic upward movement, majestic scale, cyber mythology, 16:9 aspect ratio

storyboard_9grid.scene_description: 冲出漩涡顶端，进入更高层次的数字空间——到处是浮空的代码建筑群

characters.name: 程序员
characters.action: 悬浮在空中，环顾四周的代码建筑

storyboard_9grid.atmosphere: 超越了凡人的限制——看到了更广阔的数字世界
storyboard_9grid.ai_image_prompt: A figure floating at the peak above a golden code vortex, surrounded by a vast digital cityscape of floating code architecture, towering structures made of translucent golden data, platforms connected by streams of light, epic panoramic view, weightless atmosphere, cyber mythology architecture, 16:9 aspect ratio

storyboard_9grid.scene_description: 代码建筑群中，巨大的逻辑门(Logic Gate)雕塑矗立如神殿
storyboard_9grid.atmosphere: 代码世界的神殿——逻辑之美的具象化
storyboard_9grid.ai_image_prompt: Colossal Logic Gate sculptures standing like ancient temple gates in a floating digital city, made of golden translucent code, a tiny human figure flying toward them for scale, the gates pulsing with energy, epic architectural scale, neon blue energy veins running through golden structures, cyber mythology temple, 16:9 aspect ratio

storyboard_9grid.scene_description: 主角穿过逻辑门——通过的瞬间全身闪烁金色铠甲纹路

characters.name: 程序员
characters.action: 飞速穿过逻辑门，身上开始出现金色线路纹理

transition.description: 金色纹路预示变身即将开始

storyboard_9grid.atmosphere: 穿越门槛——从凡人开始向「神」进化
storyboard_9grid.ai_image_prompt: A figure flying through a massive golden Logic Gate at high speed, the moment of passing through causing golden circuit patterns to illuminate across their body like armor forming, energy shockwave expanding from the gate, golden and neon blue light burst, transformation beginning, epic cyber mythology, 16:9 aspect ratio

storyboard_9grid.scene_description: 穿越后主角悬停，身上金色纹路持续蔓延——变身蓄力中，为下一段做铺垫

characters.name: 程序员
characters.action: 悬停在空中，金色纹路从手臂蔓延至全身

transition.description: 蓄力状态——悬念留给下一段

storyboard_9grid.atmosphere: 变身前的最后蓄力——力量在体内奔涌
storyboard_9grid.ai_image_prompt: A hovering figure with golden circuit-like patterns spreading across their body from arms to torso, glowing intensely, energy building up visibly, surrounded by swirling golden particles and code fragments, upward angle emphasizing power and transformation, pre-climax tension, epic cyber mythology atmosphere, 16:9 aspect ratio
